-O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/shar_sp/miniforge3/envs/odt/include -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/shar_sp/miniforge3/envs/odt/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/shar_sp/miniforge3/envs/odt/lib -L/home/shar_sp/miniforge3/envs/odt/lib
